BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN,\\n    ComputeTargetAngle,\\n    NormalizeAngle,\\n    GetDefaultSegments,\\n} from './FeatureWheelTypes';\\n\\nconst { ccclass, property } = _decorator;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch BigWheel Spine 動畫名（對齊 EyeStrike2_BigWheel animations）\\n * Active=進場(盤面下降+灰塵+光效) / Collect=落點中間功能亮起 / Out=退場(盤面回歸+功能暗掉)\\n * Idle=轉動中通用動畫（待機慢速 / 快轉正常速，靠 timeScale 區分；非僅待機呼吸）\\n */\\nconst BIG_WHEEL_ANIM = {\\n    Active: 'Active',\\n    Collect: 'Collect',\\n    Out: 'Out',\\n    Idle: 'Idle',\\n} as const;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 事件（獨立命名空間，與舊 MULTIPLIER_EVENT 不衝突，支援共存）\\n */\\nexport const FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT = {\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化\\n     * @param gameView 遊戲視窗\\n     */\\n    INIT: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_INIT',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格輪盤資料（server 給）\\n     * @param segments SegmentDescriptor[]（每格 type；None 格不顯示）\\n     */\\n    SET_WHEEL_DATA: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_SET_WHEEL_DATA',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback (選填) (result: SpinResult) => void\\n     */\\n    PLAY_SPIN: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_PLAY_SPIN',\\n\\n    /**@ch 顯示 UI*/\\n    SHOW_UI: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW_UI',\\n\\n    /**@ch 隱藏 UI*/\\n    HIDE_UI: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_UI',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（盤面下降+灰塵+光效；一個 round 僅一次，落在第一次轉動前）\\n     * @param callback (選填) () => void，動畫播畢回調（Spine 缺失立即回調，不 hang）\\n     */\\n    PLAY_ENTER: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_PLAY_ENTER',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（盤面回歸+中間功能暗掉；一個 round 僅一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）\\n     * @param callback (選填) () => void，動畫播畢回調（Spine 缺失立即回調，不 hang）\\n     */\\n    PLAY_EXIT: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_PLAY_EXIT',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉\\n     * PlaySpin 後輪盤停住不自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束，由呼叫端 dispatch 此事件才繼續緩轉\\n     */\\n    RESUME_IDLE: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_RESUME_IDLE',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 隱藏結果展示牌（暫代落點演出的退場）\\n     * PlayLandAnnounce 秀出展示牌後即 resolve、不自動收；由呼叫端在結果演出結束後 dispatch 此事件退場\\n     */\\n    HIDE_RESULT: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_RESULT',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 獲取目標節點\\n     * @param callback targetNode: Node 回傳目標節點\\n     */\\n    GET_TARGET_NODE: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_GET_TARGET_NODE',\\n};\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 輪盤 UI 元件\\n * 單一職責：顯示 12 格、平時 Idle 緩轉、依 server 資料換 icon、轉動落在指定格、播落點演出、把選中功能拋給外部\\n * 不碰盤面標記/重轉/改符號（呼叫端責任）\\n */\\n@ccclass('FeatureWheelManager')\\nexport class FeatureWheelManager extends Component {\\n    //#region 屬性\\n    /**@ch 根節點（顯示/隱藏）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '根節點' })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 輪盤旋轉節點（轉動的是這個，頂端指針固定不動）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '輪盤旋轉節點' })\\n    private m_wheelNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格 icon 的 SpriteChange（順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [SpriteChange], displayName: '12 格 icon SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_segmentSpriteChanges: SpriteChange[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格乘倍數值 Label（非乘倍格留空字串；順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Label], displayName: '12 格乘倍數值 Label' })\\n    private m_segmentValueLabels: Label[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格落點演出節點（順序對應格 0~11；現僅供 DevAssertConfig 數量檢查，落點演出已改用結果展示牌）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Node], displayName: '12 格落點演出節點' })\\n    private m_segmentNodes: Node[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 飛行演出起點根節點 */\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '飛行演出起點根節點' })\\n    private m_targetNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BigWheel（EyeStrike2_BigWheel）BaseSpine：進場 Active / 落點 Collect / 退場 Out / 待機 Idle，skin 依落點功能切換。\\n     * 播放走 BaseSpine（內部 SpineKit，含動畫存在檢查 + setSlotsToSetupPose）。拖 FeatureWheelResult 節點（其上有 BaseSpine）。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌（m_result* 已停用，僅保留屬性避免 prefab 反序列化警告）。\\n     */\\n    @property({ type: BaseSpine, displayName: 'BigWheel BaseSpine' })\\n    private m_bigWheelSpine: BaseSpine = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n\\n    /**@ch 待機 Idle 動畫播放速度（絕對值，不乘 SpeedUp；裝飾性慢速呼吸/慢轉，越小越慢）*/\\n    private static readonly IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE = 0.2;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE:\\n                if (typeof args[0] === 'function') {\\n                    args[0](this.GetTargetNode());\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel GET_TARGET_NODE 缺少 callback');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得目標節點（飛行演出起點）：m_targetNode → 根節點 → 自身節點 依序 fallback。\\n     * @returns 目標 Node（理論上不為 null；m_targetNode/m_rootNode 未掛時退回 this.node）\\n     */\\n    private GetTargetNode(): Node {\\n        return this.m_targetNode ?? this.m_rootNode ?? this.node;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n\\n        // 待機慢速 Idle：資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見），與 m_isIdle 同步\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        // 快轉視覺：先重設 default skin（多次轉動避免殘留上一次落點功能圖），再播正常速 Idle 循環（轉動中的動畫）；\\n        // 停下時 PlayLandAnnounce 的 Collect 以 clearTrack(0) 自然蓋掉本 Idle。\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift 直對；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 content.thinking:
The user is adding a critical bug fix to PlayEnter - they're adding `SetBigWheelSpineVisible(true)` at the beginning of the method to show the BigWheel spine before playing the Active entrance animation. This is the mandatory pairing mentioned in the design decision - if the spine is hidden during idle, it must be shown again before the entrance animation plays, otherwise the entire feature演出 will be invisible.

The comment added says "先顯示 BigWheel Spine（待機時隱藏），否則整段 feature 演出看不到。" which translates to "First show BigWheel Spine (hidden during standby), otherwise the entire feature performance won't be visible."

This is a critical bugfix - without this line, after implementing the hide-on-idle approach, the BigWheel would remain hidden when the feature activates, making the entire feature round invisible to the player.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>bugfix</type>
  <title>PlayEnter now shows BigWheel spine before entrance animation to prevent invisible feature</title>
  <subtitle>Added SetBigWheelSpineVisible(true) at start of PlayEnter method - critical fix preventing entire feature from being invisible after idle hiding implementation</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>PlayEnter method now calls SetBigWheelSpineVisible(true) before setting skin and playing Active animation</fact>
    <fact>Bug scenario: without this fix, BigWheel remains hidden (from idle state) when feature activates, making entire演出 invisible</fact>
    <fact>Call sequence in PlayEnter: show spine → set default skin → play Active entrance animation → callback</fact>
    <fact>Comment added explaining requirement: "先顯示 BigWheel Spine（待機時隱藏），否則整段 feature 演出看不到" (must show spine hidden during standby, else entire feature performance invisible)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Fixed critical visibility bug in PlayEnter by adding SetBigWheelSpineVisible(true) call at method start. This is the mandatory pairing required by the hide-on-idle refactoring: since ResumeIdle now hides the BigWheel spine during standby, PlayEnter must explicitly show it again before playing the Active entrance animation. Without this fix, the spine would remain hidden from the previous idle state when the feature round begins, resulting in the entire feature performance (entrance, spin, collect, exit) being invisible to the player. The show call is positioned first in the method, before setting the default skin and playing the animation, ensuring the spine is visible throughout the entire entrance sequence. This completes the lifecycle: hidden during idle → shown on entrance (PlayEnter) → visible through spin/collect → hidden again on return to idle (ResumeIdle).</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

Feature Wheel 輪盤 UI 元件\\n * 單一職責：顯示 12 格、平時 Idle 緩轉、依 server 資料換 icon、轉動落在指定格、播落點演出、把選中功能拋給外部\\n * 不碰盤面標記/重轉/改符號（呼叫端責任）\\n */\\n@ccclass('FeatureWheelManager')\\nexport class FeatureWheelManager    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '輪盤旋轉節點' })\\n    private m_wheelNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格 icon 的 SpriteChange（順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [SpriteChange], displayName: BigWheel（EyeStrike2_BigWheel）BaseSpine：進場 Active / 落點 Collect / 退場 Out / 待機 Idle，skin 依落點功能切換。\\n     * 播放走 BaseSpine（內部 SpineKit，含動畫存在檢查 + setSlotsToSetupPose）。拖 FeatureWheelResult 節點（其上有 null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n\\n    /**@ch 待機 Idle 動畫播放速度（絕對值，不乘 SpeedUp；裝飾性慢速呼吸/慢轉，越小越慢）*/\\n    private static readonly IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE = 0.2;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case         error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 &&    break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n error('FeatureWheel GET_TARGET_NODE 缺少 callback');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得目標節點（飛行演出起點）：m_targetNode → 根節點 → 自身節點 依序 fallback。\\n     * @returns 目標 Node（理論上不為 null；m_targetNode/m_rootNode 未掛時退回 this.node）\\n     */\\n    private GetTargetNode(): Node {\\n        return this.m_targetNode ?? this.m_rootNode ?? this.node;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n\\n        // 待機慢速 Idle：資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見），與 m_isIdle 同步\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        // 快轉視覺：先重設 default skin（多次轉動避免殘留上一次落點功能圖），再播正常速 Idle 循環（轉動中的動畫）；\\n        // 停下時 PlayLandAnnounce 的 Collect 以 clearTrack(0) 自然蓋掉本 Idle。\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift 直對；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 隱藏 BigWheel Spine（回待機）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * Spine：待機隱藏 BigWheel（feature 專屬元件，Active 進場才顯示）；軟體 12 格緩轉與 Spine 為兩獨立層，慢轉照舊\\n     */\\n    private this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE:\\n                if (typeof args[0] === 'function') {\\n                    args[0](this.GetTargetNode());\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel GET_TARGET_NODE 缺少 callback');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得目標節點（飛行演出起點）：m_targetNode → 根節點 → 自身節點 依序 fallback。\\n     * @returns 目標 Node（理論上不為 null；m_targetNode/m_rootNode 未掛時退回 this.node）\\n     */\\n    private GetTargetNode(): Node {\\n        return this.m_targetNode ?? this.m_rootNode ?? this.node;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n\\n        // 待機慢速 Idle：資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見），與 m_isIdle 同步\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        // 快轉視覺：先重設 default skin（多次轉動避免殘留上一次落點功能圖），再播正常速 Idle 循環（轉動中的動畫）；\\n        // 停下時 PlayLandAnnounce 的 Collect 以 clearTrack(0) 自然蓋掉本 Idle。\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift 直對；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 隱藏 BigWheel Spine（回待機）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * Spine：待機隱藏 BigWheel（feature 專屬元件，Active 進場才顯示）；軟體 12 格緩轉與 Spine 為兩獨立層，慢轉照舊\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.SetBigWheelSpineVisible(false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 BigWheel Spine 節點。待機隱藏（feature 專屬元件，省 draw call + 骨架更新）、進場(Active)顯示。\\n     * 委派 BaseSpine.SetSpineNodeActivity（null/失效守衛）。\\n     * @param visible 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetBigWheelSpineVisible(visible: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSpineNodeActivity(visible);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     * 先顯示 BigWheel Spine（待機時隱藏），否則整段 feature 演出看不到。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayEnter(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        this.SetBigWheelSpineVisible(true);\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Active);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayEnter onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（一個 round 一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）；播畢回調。\\n     * Out 的「中間功能暗掉」作用於當前落點 skin，故 setSkin(default) 放在 Out 之後（暗掉後再回 default 待 Idle）。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayExit(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Out);\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayExit onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定 BigWheel skin（null/失效守衛）。委派 BaseSpine.SetSkin（內含 setSlotsToSetupPose）\\n     * @param skinName skin 名（default/Multiplier/Shift/Upgrade）\\n     */\\n    private SetSpineSkin(skinName: string) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSkin(skinName);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 單次（非循環）動畫，await 播畢/中斷才 resolve。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * Spine 缺失 → 立即 resolve；動畫名無效 → BaseSpine 內部 warn + 回 false，皆不 hang 呼叫端（DR-2 完成訊號鏈防 hang）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Active/Collect/Out）\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpineOnce(animName: string): Promise<void> {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // BaseSpine.PlayAnimation 回 Promise<boolean>（播畢/中斷時 resolve）；此處只需等其結束，忽略結果旗標\\n        await this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 循環動畫（快轉 Idle），不 await（循環動畫不等完成）。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Idle）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpineLoop(animName: string) {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 循環播放：isLoop=true；回傳 Promise 於首圈完成 resolve，不 await（不影響續循環）\\n        this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, true);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 content.thinking:
This is an important cleanup edit. The PlaySpineLoop method previously had an optional `timeScale` parameter that was used for two purposes:
1. Slow speed (0.2x) for idle standby animation
2. Default speed (Game_Define.SpeedUp) for fast-forward spinning

Now that idle standby no longer uses slow animation (the spine is hidden instead), the timeScale parameter is only used for the fast-forward case, which is the default behavior when timeScale is omitted.

The edit:
1. Removes the optional `timeScale?: number` parameter from the method signature
2. Removes the timeScale parameter from the PlayAnimation call (so it uses default Game_Define.SpeedUp)
3. Updates the comment to clarify it's specifically for "快轉 Idle" (fast-forward Idle)
4. Removes the now-obsolete comment explaining the timeScale parameter usage

This is part of cleaning up Conflict 1's orphaned code. The timeScale parameter no longer serves a purpose since:
- The idle standby case (0.2x speed) has been removed
- The fast-forward case uses the default speed, which doesn't need an explicit parameter

This simplifies the method signature and makes it clearer that PlaySpineLoop is now exclusively for fast-forward spinning, not for variable-speed idle breathing.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>PlaySpineLoop simplified by removing timeScale parameter after idle animation removal</title>
  <subtitle>Removed optional timeScale parameter from PlaySpineLoop - no longer needed after switching from slow-Idle animation to hide-on-idle approach</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>PlaySpineLoop method signature simplified from PlaySpineLoop(animName: string, timeScale?: number) to PlaySpineLoop(animName: string)</fact>
    <fact>timeScale parameter removed from PlayAnimation call - now uses default Game_Define.SpeedUp for fast-forward spinning</fact>
    <fact>Comment updated from "循環動畫（Idle）" to "循環動畫（快轉 Idle）" clarifying exclusive fast-forward usage</fact>
    <fact>Removed comment explaining timeScale parameter usage: "省略 → BaseSpine 預設 Game_Define.SpeedUp（快轉用），待機慢速傳 IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE"</fact>
    <fact>Only remaining caller is PlaySpin which plays fast-forward Idle during spinning - no longer passes timeScale argument</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Cleaned up PlaySpineLoop method by removing the now-obsolete optional timeScale parameter. Previously this parameter served two purposes: (1) passing IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE (0.2x) for slow breathing animation during standby, and (2) omitting it to use default Game_Define.SpeedUp for fast-forward spinning. After refactoring idle state to hide the spine entirely instead of playing slow animation, only the fast-forward use case remains. Since fast-forward uses the default speed, the timeScale parameter serves no purpose and adds unnecessary complexity. The method now unconditionally plays Idle animation at default speed (Game_Define.SpeedUp), which is only invoked during PlaySpin for the spinning visual. This completes cleanup of Conflict 1's orphaned idle animation code by simplifying the API surface - the method signature now accurately reflects its single remaining purpose: fast-forward Idle loop during active spinning.</narrative>

    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

  //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE:\\n                if (typeof args[0] === 'function') {\\n                    args[0](this.GetTargetNode());\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel GET_TARGET_NODE 缺少 callback');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得目標節點（飛行演出起點）：m_targetNode → 根節點 → 自身節點 依序 fallback。\\n     * @returns 目標 Node（理論上不為 null；m_targetNode/m_rootNode 未掛時退回 this.node）\\n     */\\n    private GetTargetNode(): Node {\\n        return this.m_targetNode ?? this.m_rootNode ?? this.node;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n\\n        // 待機慢速 Idle：資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見），與 m_isIdle 同步\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        // 快轉視覺：先重設 default skin（多次轉動避免殘留上一次落點功能圖），再播正常速 Idle 循環（轉動中的動畫）；\\n        // 停下時 PlayLandAnnounce 的 Collect 以 clearTrack(0) 自然蓋掉本 Idle。\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift 直對；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 隱藏 BigWheel Spine（回待機）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * Spine：待機隱藏 BigWheel（feature 專屬元件，Active 進場才顯示）；軟體 12 格緩轉與 Spine 為兩獨立層，慢轉照舊\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.SetBigWheelSpineVisible(false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 BigWheel Spine 節點。待機隱藏（feature 專屬元件，省 draw call + 骨架更新）、進場(Active)顯示。\\n     * 委派 BaseSpine.SetSpineNodeActivity（null/失效守衛）。\\n     * @param visible 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetBigWheelSpineVisible(visible: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSpineNodeActivity(visible);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     * 先顯示 BigWheel Spine（待機時隱藏），否則整段 feature 演出看不到。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayEnter(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        this.SetBigWheelSpineVisible(true);\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Active);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayEnter onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（一個 round 一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）；播畢回調。\\n     * Out 的「中間功能暗掉」作用於當前落點 skin，故 setSkin(default) 放在 Out 之後（暗掉後再回 default 待 Idle）。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayExit(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Out);\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayExit onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定 BigWheel skin（null/失效守衛）。委派 BaseSpine.SetSkin（內含 setSlotsToSetupPose）\\n     * @param skinName skin 名（default/Multiplier/Shift/Upgrade）\\n     */\\n    private SetSpineSkin(skinName: string) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSkin(skinName);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 單次（非循環）動畫，await 播畢/中斷才 resolve。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * Spine 缺失 → 立即 resolve；動畫名無效 → BaseSpine 內部 warn + 回 false，皆不 hang 呼叫端（DR-2 完成訊號鏈防 hang）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Active/Collect/Out）\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpineOnce(animName: string): Promise<void> {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // BaseSpine.PlayAnimation 回 Promise<boolean>（播畢/中斷時 resolve）；此處只需等其結束，忽略結果旗標\\n        await this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 循環動畫（快轉 Idle），不 await（循環動畫不等完成）。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Idle）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpineLoop(animName: string) {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 循環播放：isLoop=true；回傳 Promise 於首圈完成 resolve，不 await（不影響續循環）\\n        this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, true);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12   // 待機隱藏 BigWheel Spine（feature 專屬元件，Active 進場才顯示）；軟體 12 格慢轉由 m_isIdle 驅動、照舊\\n        this.SetBigWheelSpineVisible(false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        // 快轉視覺：先重設 default skin（多次轉動避免殘留上一次落點功能圖），再播正常速 Idle 循環（轉動中的動畫）；\\n        // 停下時 PlayLandAnnounce 的 Collect 以 clearTrack(0) 自然蓋掉本 Idle。\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    //         }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 BigWheel Spine 節點。待機隱藏（feature 專屬元件，省 draw call + 骨架更新）、進場(Active)顯示。\\n     * 委派 BaseSpine.SetSpineNodeActivity（null/失效守衛）。\\n     * @param visible 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetBigWheelSpineVisible(visible: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSpineNodeActivity(visible);\\n content.thinking:
This is the final cleanup step for the refactoring. Two edits were made:

1. **Removed IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE constant** - This constant (value 0.2) was only used by the now-removed PlayIdleStandby method to play slow Idle animation during standby. Since the idle state now hides the spine instead of playing slow animation, this constant is orphaned and should be removed.

2. **Updated SetWheelData method** - Changed the call from `PlayIdleStandby()` to `SetBigWheelSpineVisible(false)` when wheel data is loaded. This is the second call site (besides ResumeIdle) where idle state is entered, and it now needs to hide the spine instead of playing slow animation. The comment was updated from "待機慢速 Idle：資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見），與 m_isIdle 同步" to "待機隱藏 BigWheel Spine（feature 專屬元件，Active 進場才顯示）；軟體 12 格慢轉由 m_isIdle 驅動、照舊" to reflect the new behavior.

This completes the full refactoring of Conflict 1's idle animation approach:
- ✅ Removed PlayIdleStandby method
- ✅ Added SetBigWheelSpineVisible utility method
- ✅ Updated ResumeIdle to hide instead of animate
- ✅ Updated SetWheelData to hide instead of animate  
- ✅ Updated PlayEnter to show spine before entrance
- ✅ Removed timeScale parameter from PlaySpineLoop
- ✅ Removed IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE constant

All orphaned code from the slow-Idle-animation approach has been removed, and the new hide/show approach is fully implemented.
