    <fact>IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE constant removed entirely from constants region - no longer needed after removing slow-Idle animation</fact>
    <fact>SetWheelData method updated to call SetBigWheelSpineVisible(false) instead of PlayIdleStandby when entering idle after data load</fact>
    <fact>Comment in SetWheelData changed from "資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見）" to "待機隱藏 BigWheel Spine（feature 專屬元件，Active 進場才顯示）；軟體 12 格慢轉由 m_isIdle 驅動、照舊"</fact>
    <fact>SetWheelData is second call site for entering idle state (first is ResumeIdle) - both now hide spine instead of playing slow animation</fact>
    <fact>All Conflict 1 orphaned code now removed: PlayIdleStandby method, IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE constant, PlaySpineLoop timeScale parameter</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed final cleanup of Conflict 1 idle animation code by removing the IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE constant and updating SetWheelData's idle behavior. The constant (value 0.2 for 0.2x playback speed) was only used by the removed PlayIdleStandby method and no longer serves any purpose. SetWheelData, which is called when wheel data is initially loaded from server, previously called PlayIdleStandby to start slow breathing animation - it now calls SetBigWheelSpineVisible(false) to hide the spine during initial idle state, matching ResumeIdle's behavior. The comment was updated to clarify BigWheel is a feature-exclusive component that should only be visible during Active entrance演出, and that the software 12-frame slow rotation (driven by m_isIdle flag in update()) continues independently. This completes the full refactoring from slow-Idle-animation approach to hide/show approach: all orphaned code removed (PlayIdleStandby, timeScale parameter, IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE constant), both idle entry points (SetWheelData and ResumeIdle) now hide spine, PlayEnter shows spine before entrance to prevent invisible bug. The refactoring achieves semantic correctness (component not visible when logically exited) with performance benefit as secondary gain.</narrative>

態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n   // 待機隱藏 BigWheel Spine（feature 專屬元件，Active 進場才顯示）；軟體 12 格慢轉由 m_isIdle 驅動、照舊\\n        this.SetBigWheelSpineVisible(false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        // 快轉視覺：先重設 default skin（多次轉動避免殘留上一次落點功能圖），再播正常速 Idle this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n The old comment said Idle animation was used for both standby (slow speed) and fast-forward (normal speed) distinguished by timeScale. The new comment clarifies that Idle is only used during fast-forward, and during standby the BigWheel spine is completely hidden with no Spine animation playing - the 12-segment slow rotation is software-controlled (by the update() method), not Spine-driven.

This is documentation cleanup - updating top-level comments to match the refactored implementation.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>Updated BIG_WHEEL_ANIM documentation to reflect hide-on-idle refactoring</title>
  <subtitle>Comment updated to clarify Idle animation only plays during fast-forward, standby hides BigWheel spine entirely with software-controlled 12-frame rotation</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>BIG_WHEEL_ANIM constant comment updated at file top to document new idle behavior</fact>
    <fact>Old comment stated "Idle=轉動中通用動畫（待機慢速 / 快轉正常速，靠 timeScale 區分；非僅待機呼吸）" implying dual use</fact>
    <fact>New comment states "Idle=快轉時播放（待機不播任何 Spine，BigWheel 整個隱藏；待機 12 格慢轉是軟體控、非 Spine）"</fact>
    <fact>Comment clarifies standby plays no Spine animation, BigWheel is entirely hidden, and 12-frame slow rotation is software-controlled not Spine-driven</fact>
    <fact>Documentation now accurately reflects implementation after removing slow-Idle animation and switching to hide/show approach</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Updated top-level BIG_WHEEL_ANIM comment documentation to accurately reflect the refactored idle behavior. The old comment incorrectly implied Idle animation served dual purposes (standby slow animation and fast-forward normal animation) distinguished by timeScale parameter. After refactoring, this is no longer true: Idle animation is exclusively used during fast-forward spinning (PlaySpin calls PlaySpineLoop with Idle). During standby state, no Spine animation plays at all - instead the BigWheel spine is completely hidden via SetSpineNodeActivity(false). The new comment explicitly states this: "Idle=快轉時播放" (Idle plays during fast-forward), "待機不播任何 Spine，BigWheel 整個隱藏" (standby plays no Spine animation, BigWheel entirely hidden), and "待機 12 格慢轉是軟體控、非 Spine" (standby 12-frame slow rotation is software-controlled, not Spine). This clarifies that the software rotation (m_wheelNode angle updates in update() method driven by m_isIdle flag) is independent of Spine animations. The documentation update ensures future readers understand the actual behavior after Conflict 1 cleanup.</narrative>

    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
